title: Is Market place safe for our data?

posts.author: KaveriVipat (Kaveri Vipat)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Everyone,

I just wanted to confirm if we install any app from the Monday.com Market place so it is safe for our data, how I should be sure before installing it, any advice suggestions are appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

posts.author: Megna (Megna)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Kaveri,

It’s my understanding that these programs are not independently vetted by Monday beyond some basic checks (see the screenshot below). If this is for company data & you have a IT/Security function in house, I’d always recommend having them independently check the app, the company that makes it, privacy notices, etc. to ensure security & compliance.

image1185×77 12.7 KB
